review_text: The mobile app is easy to use and the support team answered my question quickly.
Delivery was late and the package arrived damaged.
The product works as expected but the setup guide could be clearer.
I love the fast checkout process and clean website design.
Customer service at the Berlin branch was friendly and professional.
The new update made the app slower on my Samsung phone.
Microsoft Teams integration helped our group communicate better.
The price is acceptable, but I expected more features.
My order from Pristina arrived on time and everything was correct.
The chatbot did not understand my problem and gave repeated answers.
The dashboard is simple and useful for tracking weekly performance.
I visited the London office and the staff were helpful.
The headphones have average sound quality for the price.
Payment failed twice even though my Visa card was valid.
Azure AI examples in the course helped me understand sentiment analysis.
The response time was slow during the evening.
The interface looks modern, but some buttons are confusing.
Their Instagram announcement was clear and informative.
The refund process took too long and nobody contacted me.
Overall the experience was fine, nothing special.
